overall.description: A first-person walk through a dark urban tunnel or underpass at night. The camera moves steadily forward along an asphalt road with yellow lane markings, passing concrete walls with graffiti and overhead utility pipes. A single vehicle passes by from the opposite direction in the middle of the clip, briefly illuminating the scene with its headlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass entrance with wooden support structure

events.description: enters the covered tunnel area from the open dark approach, wooden bridge structure becomes visible on left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward into the dark tunnel, approaching the illuminated section ahead

entered.detail: wooden beams or bridge support structure with horizontal slats visible on the left side
concrete ceiling with sparse overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the path
smooth concrete wall on the right side of the tunnel entrance
low concrete barrier separating the walkway from the road surface

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in near-total darkness approaching a tunnel. As the camera moves forward, a wooden bridge support structure appears on the left and the concrete walls of the underpass become visible. Sparse artificial lights illuminate the asphalt road ahead as the camera enters the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved tunnel interior with utility pipes and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: vehicle with headlights on approaches from opposite direction and passes by closely on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the curved tunnel section as a car approaches and passes from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching from the opposite direction and passing by on the right

entered.detail: bundled metal pipes and cables running horizontally along the left concrete wall
concrete wall covered with spray-painted graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the tunnel, the camera follows a left curve. Metal pipes and cables become visible on the left wall while graffiti appears on the right. A car approaches from the opposite direction, its headlights cutting through the darkness, and passes by closely before receding into the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel continuation approaching exit or wider illuminated section

events.description: brighter light becomes visible ahead indicating tunnel exit or opening

agents.ego_description: walking toward the tunnel exit or opening where more light is visible in the distance

entered.detail: significantly brighter light at the end of the tunnel indicating exit or opening

segments.scene_description: In the final section, the camera continues through the tunnel toward a noticeably brighter area ahead. The graffiti-covered walls and utility pipes fall behind as the tunnel appears to open up or approach an exit, with the artificial ceiling lights now appearing farther in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the edge of a dark underpass into a dimly lit urban tunnel that eventually opens toward a brighter exit. It begins in near-total darkness, passing a wooden bridge support on the left as the camera enters the covered section and sparse artificial lights reveal the asphalt road. As the camera follows a left curve deeper into the tunnel, metal pipes and cables emerge on the left wall while graffiti appears on the right, just as an oncoming car's headlights briefly cut through the gloom before the vehicle recedes. The scene then shifts as the camera continues forward, leaving the graffiti and utility pipes behind. Finally, the tunnel begins to open up, with the artificial ceiling lights stretching into the distance toward a noticeably brighter area ahead.
